title: Southern Millet Pilaf with Thai Twist
description: A flavorful and nutritious pilaf dish that combines the heartiness of southern cuisine with a hint of Thai spices. Perfect for a satisfying side dish or light lunch.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the curry powder and ground cumin, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the millet and pilaf, and stir to combine.
Cook for 5-7 minutes, or until the millet is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
